hiddenFacts.title: Weird bug I fixed
hiddenFacts.fact: A race where localStorage was read before hydration — fixed with a gate and SSR-safe default.

hiddenFacts.title: Dev hot take
hiddenFacts.fact: Most "clean code" debates are about taste. Consistency and boundaries matter more than pattern count.

hiddenFacts.title: Favorite refactor
hiddenFacts.fact: Replacing a 2k-line "utils" file with domain-scoped helpers. Delete count felt good.
